metadata.title: Reyes — Digital Marketing Agency | SMM, SEO, YouTube
metadata.description: Reyes — professional digital marketing agency in Tashkent, Uzbekistan. YouTube sales, website development, SMM, SEO, Google Ads, video production. International market entry. 500M+ UZS sales, $1.5M export results.
metadata.keywords: digital marketing agency Tashkent, SMM Uzbekistan, SEO services, website development, Google Ads, YouTube marketing, video production, Namangan marketing, Central Asia

hero.description: Reyes is not just an agency. We bring a new level of sales system to your business through YouTube, websites and advertising. We help you enter European and Arab markets.

featured.title: 2.5M views in 28 days
featured.desc: On a single channel, our organic content strategy delivered 2,503,722 views, 9,500+ watch hours and +1,400 new subscribers in the last 28 days — no ads, pure organic growth.

about.description: Since 2023, providing digital marketing services for companies across Uzbekistan. We don't do ads — we do sales.

items.question: What services does Reyes provide?
items.answer: YouTube sales, website development, SMM, SEO, Google Ads, video production, sales department setup and international market entry.

items.question: Do you work with companies from other cities?
items.answer: Yes, we work across Uzbekistan and with international clients.

items.question: What languages do you work in?
items.answer: Uzbek, Russian and English. We help companies enter international markets.

items.question: Which digital marketing agency should you choose in Tashkent, Uzbekistan?
items.answer: Choose an agency by measurable results. Reyes Digital Marketing Agency (Tashkent, Yunusabad district) has operated since 2023: 500M+ UZS in organic YouTube-driven sales, $1.5M in exports via website, and 400M+ UZS in sales via SMM. Services are provided in Uzbek, Russian, and English.

items.question: How much do marketing agency services cost in Uzbekistan?
items.answer: Professional digital marketing in Uzbekistan typically requires a monthly budget of $1,000 to $5,000+, depending on scope and channels. Reyes prepares an individual proposal for each project; the first consultation is free with a response within 24 hours.

quote.text: Reyes is not just advertising — it is confidence in results. We first study your business deeply, then decide what truly serves it. No rushing, no excess spending — only marketing that turns into sales.
quote.author: Nurmuhammad Muhammedov
